title: Antareen
overview: Fathered by a politician's loveless extramarital passion, Torali's life is a quest for sanctuary from her father's loveless world, but her intent to uncover his transgression gets her trapped in a mental asylum. In that very trap, she finds Samiran who takes up her fight against the wrongs of a patriarchal world.
